title: modeldeployment chart values
description: Schema for charts/modeldeployment. Validates the per-InferenceSet inputs whose misconfiguration is surfaced by the modeldeployment-level schema reasons in the end-to-end error-handling proposal (e.g. inferencesetScalingMisconfigured). Cross-field guards that JSON Schema cannot express on its own (notably maxReplicas >= replicas) are additionally enforced by a fail-fast Helm template guard at render time.

name.description: Deployment / InferenceSet name. Empty falls back to .Release.Name.

namespace.description: Target workload namespace. Empty falls back to .Release.Namespace.

model.description: Inference preset name set on the InferenceSet. MUST be non-empty.

instanceType.description: VM instance type used for the underlying GPU nodes.

replicas.description: Desired number of InferenceSet replicas. MUST be at least 1.

enableScaling.description: Toggles KAITO ScaledObject auto-provisioning. When false, maxReplicas and scalingThreshold are ignored.

maxReplicas.description: Upper bound for autoscaling. Only used when enableScaling is true. MUST be at least 1; the Helm template additionally enforces maxReplicas >= replicas when enableScaling is true.

scalingThreshold.description: Deprecated single-metric queue-depth threshold, superseded by scaling.metrics[*].upThreshold/downThreshold. Retained so pre-existing overrides still validate; no longer wired to any annotation.

scaling.description: Composite (multi-metric) autoscaling configuration wired to scaledobject.kaito.sh/* annotations. Consumed only when enableScaling is true; keda-kaito-scaler combines every metric under a conservative AND policy. Misconfiguration here is surfaced as inferencesetScalingMisconfigured.

metrics.description: Ordered list of scaling signals. Each entry renders one indexed scaledobject.kaito.sh/<key>/<i> slot. MUST contain at least one entry when enableScaling is true (also enforced by a fail-fast template guard).

name.description: Prometheus metric family name exposed by each inference pod. Wired to scaledobject.kaito.sh/metricName/<i>.

type.description: Aggregation applied to the metric: gauge -> per-replica average; histogram -> per-pod quantile. Wired to scaledobject.kaito.sh/metricstype/<i>. Defaults to gauge.

upThreshold.description: Per-replica scale-up threshold (float). REQUIRED when enableScaling is true: empty by default, and a fail-fast template guard rejects the install when it is left unset. MUST be strictly greater than downThreshold (also enforced by the template guard). Wired to scaledobject.kaito.sh/upthreshold/<i>.

downThreshold.description: Per-replica scale-down threshold (float). MUST be strictly less than upThreshold. REQUIRED when enableScaling is true: empty by default, and a fail-fast template guard rejects the install when it is left unset. Wired to scaledobject.kaito.sh/downthreshold/<i>.

quantile.description: Target quantile in (0, 1] for histogram metrics; ignored for gauge. Empty inherits keda-kaito-scaler's 0.95 default. Wired to scaledobject.kaito.sh/quantile/<i>.

evaluationWindow.description: Scale-up stabilization window in seconds. Wired to scaledobject.kaito.sh/evaluationwindow.

scaleUpCooldown.description: Minimum seconds between scale-up steps. Wired to scaledobject.kaito.sh/scaleupcooldown.

scaleDownCooldown.description: Minimum seconds between scale-down steps. Wired to scaledobject.kaito.sh/scaledowncooldown.

enableBenchmark.description: Toggles KAITO benchmark runs for this InferenceSet. When false, the kaito.sh/disable-benchmark annotation is stamped on the InferenceSet.

performanceMode.description: When non-empty, stamps kaito.sh/performance-mode: <value> on the InferenceSet template so the KAITO controller applies the corresponding vLLM profile. Empty (default) omits the annotation and the controller falls back to its own default (balanced). Allowed values: interactivity (low per-request latency), balanced (trade-off), throughput (maximize aggregate tokens/sec).

gatewayName.description: Gateway the HTTPRoute attaches to. Empty derives '<namespace>-gw'.

modelServerPort.description: Port exposed by the inference (model server) pods.

extProcPort.description: EPP gRPC ext_proc port consumed by the Gateway.

cloudprovider.description: Cloud provider gate. When empty (default), templates/httproute.yaml renders (header-only routing). When "azure", templates/httproute.yaml is skipped and templates/azure/httproute.yaml renders instead (adds hostnames: [<namespace>.<zoneName>] matching the modelharness Gateway's Azure default-domain HTTPS listener).

azure.description: Azure-specific values consumed by templates/azure/*. Ignored unless cloudprovider="azure".

defaultDomain.description: Drives the `hostnames` field on templates/azure/httproute.yaml so it attaches to the modelharness Gateway's HTTPS default-domain listener.

zoneName.description: Cluster's AKS-issued default-domain zone (without the '*.' prefix). Required when cloudprovider=azure — template renders `fail` otherwise. MUST match the corresponding modelharness release's azure.defaultDomain.zoneName.
